validation: All six Blender/browser cases have exact vertex and face counts, covering the authored result, line weight, pixel size, subdivision level, edge crease, and height. Local bounds differ by at most 0.0001 units. Authored mode reconstructs chrome.002 and preserves rough=0 across all 5,664 faces. The controlled local-space studio comparison measures 0.9957 silhouette IoU and 0.1100 RGB MAE; the residual is environment filtering and Eevee/Three.js reflection behavior.
